\tzpentry{ID3717}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3717 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\r\n\t\t\\mathbf{B}_{rotating} \\sim \\sum_{k=0}^{6} e^{i k \\cdot 2\\pi/7} f_k(r, \\theta)\r\n\t\t\\end{equation}
